subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Haqqu'n-Nas
subcodes.first_line:
Praise be to God Who fulfilled what He revealed to all His Prophets and
Messengers and gave to all the tidings of His days
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی وفی بما اوحی علی کافة انبیائه و رسله و بشر الکل بایامه و منها یوم
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @goodly deeds; actions, @soul; spirit after death, @Islamic laws and jurisprudence, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture
